violations.text: Menu does not contain an allergen statement. English Food Allergies What You Need to Know Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

Per interview of staff, blender bowls and equipment used for beverages are only washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the 3 door refrigerator, and display case have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The floor in the walk in freezer has an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025
The ceiling near the ice machine is in poor repair, with a piece hanging down. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2026
Per PIC, blender cups are rinsed in the hand sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023

Half & Half was observed held at 54 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed of half & half. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the front service area. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the portable fan has an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. PIC removed from the area to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023
